response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work at Optilyz and current AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq matching the role's stack and AI agent requirement. Polyglot background (Java, TypeScript, Python-adjacent, DLang) aligns with the multi-language expectation, and demonstrated craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based) fit the architecture and code-review responsibilities. Some gaps exist around Nest.js and Vitest specifically, but the foundational fit is strong.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq
Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB background at Optilyz
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Vitest not listed; testing experience is general rather than framework-specific
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience is dated (robotic arms era)
